commands.review_summary:
This draft PR adds an opt-in training export system with config schema/help, docs, compaction/reset/trajectory triggers, JSONL episode writing, message/tool conversion helpers, and unit tests.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? For the feature as a whole, runtime reproduction is not applicable to current main because this is draft new functionality; for the blocking patch bug, yes, source inspection shows all triggers trim unfinished tails while the added trajectory_export test expects those cases to be skipped.
